name: WINMARK CORP
business: Winmark Corporation is a franchisor of five resale brands: Plato's Closet, Once Upon A Child, Play It Again Sports, Style Encore, and Music Go Round. It franchises the rights to operate retail stores that buy and sell gently used merchandise to entrepreneurs. The company generates revenue primarily from royalties and franchise fees from franchisees.

exposures.sentence: Winmark the Resale Company (Winmark Corporation, Winmark or the Company), is a nationally recognized franchisor focused on sustainability and small business formation.
We have developed an e-commerce platform that allows franchisees of our Music Go Round, Play It Again Sports and Style Encore brands to market and sell in-store product inventory online.
As a leader in the circular economy, we have been at the forefront of the sustainability movement for over 35 years.

catalysts.event: Majority of 82 signed franchise agreements expected to open
catalysts.sentence: At December 27, 2025, we had 82 signed franchise agreements, of which the majority are expected to open in 2026.
The franchise fee in March 2026 for an initial store in Canada will be $34,200CAD, and an additional store in Canada will be $20,500CAD.
